project_title: Master Bundle Atlas - 152 source and handoff packets
final_object_type: source packet governance and project-routing system
runtime_target: packet registry with extraction, authority, route, duplicate-risk, and promotion-decision fields
operational_end_state: A large archive can be converted into governed build inputs by assigning each packet identity, source state, authority, project route, and next action.
minimum_operational_release: A promotion-ready source packet for Master Bundle Packet Promotion Atlas: inventory, authority classification, routing rule, claim ceiling, and reconciliation report.
full_build_definition: A source or packet system with inventory, provenance, authority status, routing logic, claim ceiling, promotion rule, and reconciliation tests.
source_actions_before_claim: Carry 7 source-application role(s) into the first build release and convert the most load-bearing source into a close-read contract before any quotation, page-specific citation, or strong literature-positioning claim.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
public_claim_now: May claim a full-build candidate exists with proof and source contracts; do not claim deployment, outside validation, or production readiness until live execution and passage verification are recorded.
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
blocking_gates: live capture and outside-use evidence before deployment or validation claims
first_full_build: Run one packet through canonical/derivative/archive/build-now classification and capture the next action.
launch_or_review_path: Open the source packet contract for `master-bundle-atlas`, reconcile source inventory, and render the promotion decision.

instruments.purpose: Turn the `packet registry` module into a concrete input-operation-output step for Master Bundle Packet Promotion Atlas.
instruments.input_contract: Project fixture, source duty, current claim boundary, and required output state.
instruments.operation: Execute or inspect the packet registry step against the project fixture and record the state change it is supposed to produce.
instruments.output_contract: A reviewer-visible state record, output artifact, or decision boundary tied to the project acceptance tests.
instruments.acceptance_condition: The packet registry instrument is present, named, connected to the fixture, and has an output or decision field that can be reviewed.

acceptance_tests: claim ceiling test: public claims cannot exceed built evidence
source test: metadata-routed sources require close reading before citation or quotation
privacy test: no local paths or private directories in public deploy
promotion test: item cannot advance without identity, authority, route, and next action

fixture.fixture_name: Master Bundle Packet Promotion Atlas first operational slice
fixture.input: Run one packet through canonical/derivative/archive/build-now classification and capture the next action.
fixture.operation: Run the room engine through each required instrument, then produce a reviewer-visible state record and claim boundary.
fixture.expected_output: A promotion-ready source packet for Master Bundle Packet Promotion Atlas: inventory, authority classification, routing rule, claim ceiling, and reconciliation report.

export_schema.instrument_results: one result object per required module
export_schema.acceptance_results: one result object per required test
export_schema.claim_boundary: public claim ceiling after this run
export_schema.full_underlying_system_complete: always false unless backed by actual external runtime evidence
